# New analyst report: Gartner’s Market Guide for Online Fraud Detection

Online fraud detection is growing in complexity and demand. What qualities should security and risk management leaders look for in a solution? Gartner’s…

![Sift Author Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20504%20504'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift Trust and Safety Team

May 31, 2018

![black-dot](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/black-dot.svg)

![Press-Release-Tile-Image-Color-Pills\_Blue](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Online fraud detection is growing in complexity and demand. What qualities should security and risk management leaders look for in a solution? Gartner’s Market Guide for Online Fraud Detection provides an overview of the market’s direction, from approaches that offer static data-based identification to those providing continuous risk assessment.

The guide also discusses the rise of machine learning in fraud detection, so organizations can make fast and effective risk decisions, and provides recommendations for incorporating this technology into your fraud prevention approach. Finally, Gartner analysts provide a list of vendors in the online fraud detection space, grouped by capability.

Download the Market Guide for Online Fraud Detection now!
